item.title: Checking Out 3 Different Hololive Pop Up Shops and Exhibitions
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw "Cradle" by https://www.youtube.com/@UC3_tcjJS_a1NpDpYaCCTwcw Hololive event/collab vlog playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct5KQkT5pLgMt7m4rtRiKcLl
▼Related Videos▼ Visiting the Hololive friends factory & Marine Tower Collab: https://youtu.be/aRPzTMZAE6c Unboxing the 1/6 scale Yukihana Lamy from Hololive: https://youtu.be/8_pw4dXYI94 Unboxing the Kazama Iroha figure by Claynel: https://youtu.be/LBAIDJtJ1_c
▼Related Links▼ HoloNatsu Tsutaya: https://shibuyatsutaya.tsite.jp/article/1185.html Hello Hololive: https://shibuyatsutaya.tsite.jp/article/1289.html Holo Detective/Phantom Thief: https://holo-mysterymuseum.com/
Timestamps 0:00 - Holo Summer Pop Up Store 2:13 - Holo Summer goods 4:50 - Hello Hololive exhibition 8:28 - Hello Hololive goods 11:55 - Holo Detective/ Phantom Thief Escape Room 19:19 - Holo Detective/ Phantom Thief goods 26:10 - Final thoughts

item.title: I Got Sponsored to Sell You hololive Merch (and I need your wallet)
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
👻 "horrorlive" in Seoul, Korea Limited Pop-up Merch - Shipping Globally Purchase Link: https://fanding.me/hololive_horrorlive_md Featuring: 🚑 #oozorasubaru 💀 #moricalliope 🐔 #takanashikiara 🎹✨ #otonosekanade
*ONLY UNTIL THIS WEEKEND!* Sale closes at: - Dec 7th 11:59 PM (KST) - Dec 7th 7:59 AM (PST) - Dec 7th 9:59 AM (EST)
✨ Support & Follow hwikky - X (Twitter): x.com/hwikkyofficial - Patreon: patreon.com/hwikky - Ko-fi: ko-fi.com/hwikky
#hololive #ホロライブ #Fanding #팬딩

item.title: 最後一秒才決定飛印尼看hololive... 結果變成本年度最難忘的一次旅行【 hololive concert Chromatic Future】
item.author: Gordon Yeung
item.content:encoded: *記得開啟CC字幕 剛從一趟完全「說去就去」的印尼Hololive之旅回來……結果不知不覺變成我2025年目前最難忘的旅程啦 演唱會、展覽、after party、認識一堆新朋友、唱到失聲、錢包也失蹤——超值得！ 希望你們會喜歡這支又亂又暖的vlog 我的社群在這裡： Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/gordonyeung314/ X：https://x.com/hky_gordon

item.title: Hololive Goods Haul July- November 2025
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks Hololive goods and haul playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct4reBt9faUqqR1gBYMpPk4l
Timestamps 0:00 - Intro 0:26 - Hololive Friends with u 0:42 - Hololive Friends to go Accessories 1:44 - Shion Graduation and Revival goods 4:09 - Misc. Shion goods (acrylic stands, keyholder, etc) 5:30 - HoloX 3rd Anniversary goods 6:54 - Misc. Sakamata goods (acrylic stands, keyholder, etc) 7:14 - Sakamata Revival goods 9:39 - Sakamata 3rd Anniversary goods 13:16 - Hololive Summer 2023 acrylic stands 13:38 - Gura shrimp 14:01 - Ririka Genkai Meshi plate 14:29 - Misc. Nene and Lamy goods 15:18 - Lamy Cyber Outfit goods 16:14 - Nene Birthday goods 21:27 - Subaru 1st Album "Pleiades" 21:57 - Subaru 6th Anniversary goods 23:33 - Subaru EXPO 2025 acrylic stand 24:05 - Hololive EXPO 2025 gacha cards & shikishi 29:15 - Final thoughts

item.title: I Fly the World-First VTuber Airplane 【 hololive "ita-plane" 】
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
🍹 hololive production Cheer UP Pop-up Cafe is now OPEN! 🍰 - From October 18th to December 06th - At ARCANE CAFE in LA (171 Live Oak Ave Suite D, Arcadia, CA 91006) - hololive-themed space inside the Cafe - Exclusive merch, food, drinks, and giveaways ✨ More details here: https://arcanecafe.com/hololive/
+ hololive production Cheer UP FUN RUN: https://x.com/hwikkyofficial/status/1964161634101793214 Go and cheer the hololive fans joining as runners!
⭐ Please follow and support hwikky! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky
#PR #hololiveproductionCheerUPCafe #hololive #ホロライブ
